moments.title: British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix concludes today at Silverstone, with the main race determining the winner of this iconic event.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: It's race day at Silverstone! Who will take the chequered flag at the British Grand Prix today? All eyes on the final laps.

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: The roar is real! The British Grand Prix culminates today. Catch all the high-octane action as the F1 drivers battle for glory.

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in their second week, building towards the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals next weekend.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! Wimbledon is in full swing for its second week. Who are you backing to reach the finals?

angles.name: Grass Court Drama
angles.copy: The tension is building at SW19! We're into the crucial second week of Wimbledon with quarter-finals and semi-finals on the horizon.

moments.title: Tour de France Underway
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is underway, with cyclists battling through early stages in Spain and heading towards France.

angles.name: Cycling Grand Tour
angles.copy: The Tour de France has begun! Catch all the action as the peloton navigates the stunning, but challenging, early stages.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Race
angles.copy: Who will claim the Yellow Jersey? The Tour de France is live, bringing daily drama from the world of professional cycling.

moments.title: Cardiff Food & Drink Festival Closes
moments.blurb: The Cardiff Food and Drink Festival wraps up today in Roald Dahl Plass, having offered a weekend of local produce, international delicacies, and live music.

angles.name: Last Bites in Cardiff
angles.copy: Final call for flavour! The Cardiff Food & Drink Festival finishes today. Don't miss your last chance to indulge in the best local and international treats!

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: It's been a delicious weekend! The Cardiff Food & Drink Festival concludes this evening. What was your favourite discovery?

moments.title: Glamorgan Cricket Double Header
moments.blurb: Glamorgan are playing a Vitality Blast double header today against Worcestershire Rapids at Sophia Gardens, Cardiff.

angles.name: Cricket in Cardiff
angles.copy: Double the action in Cardiff today! Glamorgan take on Worcestershire Rapids in a Vitality Blast men's and women's double header.

angles.name: Sophia Gardens Live
angles.copy: Sun's out, stumps are flying! It's a big day for cricket fans in Cardiff with Glamorgan in Vitality Blast action.

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK's 13th season continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with fresh drama and couplings from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island! What's got the villa talking tonight? Tune in for all the latest couplings and dumpings.

angles.name: Summer of Love (Island)
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? We are too! Catch tonight's episode for more sun, scandal, and questionable decisions.

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancellation Still Buzzing
moments.blurb: The cancellation of Wireless Festival 2026 in London, originally set for July 10-12, continues to be a talking point after headliner Ye was denied UK entry.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: Wireless Festival's cancellation is still making waves. A major blow for London's summer music scene and a reminder of how quickly things can change.

angles.name: Ye's UK Entry Saga
angles.copy: No Wireless this year. The decision to deny Ye entry to the UK sparked controversy and led to the festival's cancellation. What's your take?

moments.title: New Music Friday: Rolling Stones, Jack White & More
moments.blurb: This Friday sees a raft of new album releases, including fresh music from rock legends The Rolling Stones, Jack White, Bring Me The Horizon, and King Crimson.

angles.name: Friday Drops
angles.copy: New Music Friday is coming! Get ready for fresh albums from The Rolling Stones, Jack White, Bring Me The Horizon and more.

angles.name: Album Alert
angles.copy: What's on your playlist this Friday? Big releases from rock icons and modern heavyweights are dropping. Start planning your listening session!

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days next Sunday, ahead of the main tournament starting July 16th.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: Next Sunday, the world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale as practice days for The Open Championship begin. Get ready for golf's original major!

angles.name: Birkdale Calling
angles.copy: The countdown to The Open is on! Next week sees the start of practice days at Royal Birkdale. Who's your early pick for the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, the charismatic frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 today, known for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love' and 'Heart and Soul'.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the one and only Huey Lewis! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Turning 76 today, it's Huey Lewis! Still feeling 'The Power of Love' for this 80s legend. Send him some birthday wishes!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Marc Almond
moments.blurb: Marc Almond, the distinctive voice of Soft Cell and a celebrated solo artist, celebrates his 69th birthday today.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Star
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the iconic Marc Almond! From Soft Cell to his incredible solo career, his voice is unforgettable.

angles.name: Tainted Love Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 69th birthday to Marc Almond! Still 'Tainted Love' after all these years? We definitely are!

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk legend George Clinton, the mastermind behind Parliament-Funkadelic, turns 85 tomorrow, continuing his incredible influence on music.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the grand architect of funk, George Clinton, turns 85! Get ready to get down with some Parliament-Funkadelic tunes.

angles.name: P-Funk Power
angles.copy: Wishing a very funky early birthday to George Clinton! The 85-year-old icon is still 'Atomic Dog' in our hearts.

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Rap Royalty
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only 50 Cent turns 51! Get ready to blast some 'In Da Club' in celebration.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a happy early 51st birthday to rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent! What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, turns 86 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The iconic Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday this Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his distinctive drumming?

angles.name: Drummer Boy
angles.copy: It's Ringo Starr's 86th birthday on Tuesday! Still one of the most recognisable drummers in music history. Give him some love!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Beck
moments.blurb: Multi-genre innovator Beck, known for hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At,' celebrates his 56th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 56th birthday to the incredibly talented Beck on Wednesday! What's your favourite era of his music?

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: He's a 'Loser' baby, but a winner in our hearts! Happy 56th birthday to the ever-inventive Beck this Wednesday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love turns 62 on Thursday.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the legendary Courtney Love this Thursday! A true force in rock music.

angles.name: Hole's Frontwoman
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Courtney Love, turning 62 on Thursday! Celebrate with your favourite Hole track.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: The prolific and influential Jack White, known for The White Stripes and his solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Rock Innovator
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White this Thursday! From The White Stripes to his solo projects, he's a true guitar hero.

angles.name: White Stripes Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st birthday on Thursday! What's your top track from this prolific artist?

moments.title: PET NEEDS Live in Exeter
moments.blurb: Bomba Live in Exeter hosts punk rock band PET NEEDS next Friday, July 12th, for a high-energy gig.

angles.name: Exeter Gig Alert
angles.copy: Get ready, Exeter! PET NEEDS are bringing their punk rock energy to Bomba Live next Friday, July 12th. Don't miss it!

angles.name: Live Music in Devon
angles.copy: Looking for live music next weekend? PET NEEDS hit Bomba Live in Exeter on Friday. Grab your tickets!

moments.title: Comedy at Exeter Castle: Joanne McNally & Paul Smith
moments.blurb: Exeter Castle presents two nights of top comedy this weekend, featuring Joanne McNally on Friday and Paul Smith on Saturday.

angles.name: Exeter Laughs
angles.copy: Comedy takes over Exeter Castle this Friday with Joanne McNally and Saturday with Paul Smith! Get ready for a weekend of laughs.

angles.name: Castle Stand-Up
angles.copy: Don't miss a fantastic double bill of comedy at Exeter Castle, with Joanne McNally (Friday) and Paul Smith (Saturday) on stage!
